name: MCP Bridge
description: Bridge between Super Productivity and MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers for Claude Desktop integration
author: Super Productivity Team

changelog.1.2.0: MCP API redesign — 16-tool surface, server-side tag/project resolution, human-readable time, due dates, batch create, completed task history, convert_to_subtask
changelog.1.1.1: Fix SP double-write bug when creating subtasks with parentId
changelog.1.1.0: Structured log levels, MCP call instrumentation, dashboard log delivery fix, log level selector UI
changelog.1.0.0: Initial release with full MCP bridge functionality
